Subject: Här kommer dina utvalda erbjudanden

<!DOCTYPE html PUBLIC "-//W3C//DTD XHTML 1.0 Transitional//EN" "http://www.w3.org/TR/xhtml1/DTD/xhtml1-transitional.dtd">

<head>
	<title>Här kommer dina utvalda erbjudanden</title>

	<xml>
 		<o:OfficeDocumentSettings>

	<style type="text/css">/* ICA FONTS */

		@font-face {
			font-family: 'icatext';
			font-weight: normal;
			font-style: normal;
			src: url('https://assets.icanet.se/raw/upload/fonts/ICATextNy-Regular.woff') format('woff'), url('https://assets.icanet.se/raw/upload/fonts/ICATextNy-Regular.woff2') format('woff2');
		}

		@font-face {
			font-family: 'icatext';
			font-weight: bold;
			font-style: normal;
			src: url('https://assets.icanet.se/raw/upload/fonts/ICATextNy-Bold.woff') format('woff'), url('https://assets.icanet.se/raw/upload/fonts/ICATextNy-Bold.woff2') format('woff2');
		}

		@font-face {
			font-family: 'icarubrik';
			font-weight: bold;
			font-style: normal;
			src: url('https://assets.icanet.se/raw/upload/fonts/ICARubrik-Bold.woff') format('woff'), url('https://assets.icanet.se/raw/upload/fonts/ICARubrik-Bold.woff2') format('woff2');
		}


div.preheader 
{ display: none !important; } 

		/* CLIENT-SPECIFICS */

		#outlook a {
			padding: 0;
		}

		/* Force Outlook to provide a "view in browser" message */

		.ReadMsgBody {
			width: 100%;
		}

		/* Force Hotmail to display emails at full width */

		.ExternalClass {
			width: 100%;
		}

		/* Force Hotmail to display normal line spacing */

		.ExternalClass,
		.ExternalClass p,
		.ExternalClass span,
		.ExternalClass font,
		.ExternalClass td,
		.ExternalClass div {
			line-height: 100%;
		}

		/* Prevent WebKit and Windows mobile changing default text sizes */

		body,
		table,
		td,
		p,
		a,
		li,
		blockquote {
			-webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%;
			-ms-text-size-adjust: 100%;
		}

		/* Remove spacing between tables in Outlook 2007 and up */

		table,
		td {
			mso-table-lspace: 0;
			mso-table-rspace: 0;
		}

		/* Allow smoother rendering of resized image in Internet Explorer */

		img {
			-ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic;
		}

		/* RESETS */

		body {
			margin: 0;
			padding: 0;
		}

		img {
			border: 0;
			height: auto;
			line-height: 100%;
			outline: none;
			text-decoration: none;
		}

		table {
			border-collapse: collapse !important;
		}

		body,
		#bodyTable,
		#bodyCell_head {
			margin: 0;
			padding: 0;
			width: 100% !important;
		}

		body,
		#bodyCell {
			margin: 0;
			padding: 0;
			width: 100% !important;
		}

		.contact-icon {
			display: inline !important;
			line-height: normal !important;
			max-height: none !important;
			max-width: none !important;
			opacity: 1 !important;
			overflow: visible !important;
		}

		@media screen and (max-width: 652px) {

			/* MOBILE RESETS */

			/* Prevent Webkit platforms from changing default text sizes */

			body, table, td, p, a, li, blockquote {
				-webkit-text-size-adjust: none !important;
			}

			/* Prevent iOS Mail from adding padding to the body */

			body {
				width: 100% !important;
				min-width: 100% !important;
			}

		}

		@media screen and (max-width: 652px) {

			.contact-icon {
				display: inline !important;
				line-height: normal !important;
				max-height: none !important;
				max-width: none !important;
				opacity: 1 !important;
				overflow: visible !important;
			}
			
			.mobile.fluent {
				width: 100% !important;
			}

			.mobile.fluent.content {
				height: auto !important;
			}

			.mobile.padding-top-16 {
				padding-top: 16px !important;
			}

			.mobile.card-padding {
				padding-left: 16px !important;
				padding-right: 16px !important;
			}

			.mobile.spacer-width {
				width: 264px !important;
			}

			.mobile.center {
				display: block !important;
				margin-left: auto !important;
				margin-right: auto !important;
				text-align: center !important;
			}

			.mobile.inlinebanner-width {
				width: 100% !important;
				padding-left: 0px !important;
				padding-right: 0px !important;
			}

		}
	</style>
	<!--[if gte mso 9]><style type=”text/css”>h1, h2, h3, td, p, b, i, div, a { font-family:Arial, sans-serif !important; }</style><![endif]-->
</head>
<body><!-- PREHEADER START -->
<div class="preheader" style="display:none !important; visibility:hidden; mso-hide:all; font-size:10px; color:#333333; line-height:1px; max-height:0px; max-width:0px; opacity:0; overflow:hidden;">V 24. Spana in torsdagens kalaserbjudanden och planera för en riktigt prisvärd och god vecka! Nu på torsdag hittar du extra bra priser på utvalda varor för dig som är eller vill bli stammis. Passa på att laga en riktig god kalasmåltid med veckans kalasvaror. <br><br>Välkommen in till oss! </div>
<!-- PREHEADER ENDED -->

						<td style="text-align:center; color:#3f3f40; font-size:16px; font-family:icatext, Arial; line-height:20px; padding-top:16px; padding-bottom:16px;">Spana in torsdagens kalaserbjudanden och planera för en riktigt prisvärd och god vecka! 						<h3 class="article-name" style="font-weight:bold; font-size:24px !important; font-family:icarubrik, Arial; margin-top:0; margin-bottom:0;"><a href="http://links.mail.ica." name="OFFER_MASS-01_TEXT-OFFER-NAME" style="color:#3f3f40; text-decoration:none; display:inline;" target="_blank" >Matchkorv </a></h3>

						<b class="article-info" style="color:#3f3f40; font-size:14px; font-family:icatext, Arial; display:inline-block; font-weight:normal; padding-bottom:2px;">Jfr pris 117:50/kg.</b><br />
						<br />

<table align="center" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
	<tbody>
		<tr>
			<td style="border-bottom: 2px dotted #FFE7F2; padding-top:16px; padding-bottom:16px;"><!-- OFFER IMAGE START -->

		<!-- PLATE CONTENT ROW ENDED --><!-- ---------------------------------------------------------------------- --><!-- PLATE FOOTER ROW START -->
		<tr>
			<td align="center" style="background-color:#FFFFFF;">
			<table width="100%">
				
					<tr>
						<td align="center" style="background-color:#FFFFFF; border-top:5px solid #eb1f07;">
						<table border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0"><!-- STORE CONTACT INFORMATION START --><!-- START: STORE LOGO + TEXT -->
							
								<tr>
									<td align="center"></td>
